Identifier and type name generator algorithms

This module provide helper functions to deal with nim's style insensetivity when generating code (especially when converting from other sources that are not style-insensetive).

Along with simple tools for fixing up names by removing all non-identifier symbols 'name cache' is provided for making it easier to keep track of all identifier renames and avoid name clashes by keeping track of all generated names.

  • NOTE :: All identifiers are genrated in accordance with nep1 style guide. Alternative naming styles (snake case) are not currently supported, and most likely won't be added in the future either.

Imports

hstring_algo, halgorithm, base_errors, hdebug_misc

Types

StringNameCache = object
  renames: Table[string, string] ## 'raw' name mapped to renamed
                                 ## counterparts
  idents: Table[string, seq[string]] ## 'renamed' identifier mapped to
  genNormalized: CountTable[string] ## Set of all *normalized* generated
                                    ## identifiers

Procs

proc nimNorm(str: string; normalize: bool = true): string {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
Normalize nim identifier name 
proc keepNimIdentChars(str: string): string {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
Remove all non-identifier characters and collapse multiple underscrores into single one. Remove all leading underscores. 
proc fixIdentName(str: string; prefix: string): string {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
Convert possibly reserved identifier str to save identfier by prepending prefix. 
proc fixIdentName(str, prefix: string; cache: var StringNameCache;
                  requirePrefix: bool = false): string {...}{.
    raises: [KeyError, ArgumentError], tags: [].}
proc fixNimTypeName(str: string; useReserved: bool = true): string {...}{.raises: [],
    tags: [].}
Convert possibly reserved type identifier str to string by capitalizing and replacing all prohibited characters.
  • @arg{useReserved} :: Do not modify type name if it a reserved primitive (e.g. string won't be changed by default, but with useReserved = false it will be converted to String)
proc enumPrefixForCamel(camel: string): string {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
Return enum prefix for camel case identifier 
proc enumPrefixForCamel(camel: string; cache: var StringNameCache): string {...}{.
    raises: [KeyError, ArgumentError], tags: [].}
proc kindEnumName(name, parent: string): string {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
proc kindEnumName(name, parent: string; cache: var StringNameCache;
                  addPrefix: bool = true): string {...}{.
    raises: [KeyError, ArgumentError], tags: [].}

Funcs

func hasExactName(cache: StringNameCache; name: string): bool {...}{.raises: [],
    tags: [].}
func newName(cache: var StringNameCache; str: string; normalize: bool = true;
             extra: string = ""; forceRename: bool = false): string {...}{.
    raises: [KeyError], tags: [].}

Create new unique name for str

If normalized str & extra has never been used as identifier in the cache return it unmodified, otherwise return new name.

Rename str -> result is registered

  • @arg{extra} :: Disambiguation string that will not be included in final name generation, but would participate in collision resolution.
func getName(cache: var StringNameCache; str: string): string {...}{.
    raises: [KeyError], tags: [].}
func newRename(cache: var StringNameCache; baseName, newName: string;
               exact: bool = true) {...}{.raises: [ArgumentError], tags: [].}
Register rename from baseName to newName 
func knownRename(cache: StringNameCache; baseName: string; exact: bool = true): bool {...}{.
    raises: [], tags: [].}
Whether baseName has been renamed to something in the cache 
func knownGenerated(cache: StringNameCache; name: string): bool {...}{.raises: [],
    tags: [].}
Whether normalized form of name was created in the cache 
func knownName(cache: StringNameCache; name: string): bool {...}{.raises: [],
    tags: [].}
Whether name has already been generated in the cache 
func getRename(cache: StringNameCache; baseName: string; exact: bool = true): string {...}{.
    raises: [KeyError], tags: [].}
Get what baseName was renamed to in the cache 
func commonPrefix[T](seqs: seq[seq[T]]): seq[T]
Find common prefix for list of strings 
func isReservedNimType(str: string): bool {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
func isReservedNimIdent(str: string): bool {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
func isReservedNimWord(str: string): bool {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
